specVersion.description: the specification version. MUST be matched against the specification for disambiguation. in this schema it MUST be {"0.0.1"}. SHOULD be matched to disambiguate specifics of a LayerZip spec
specVersion.$comment: in terms of regex it must be {"^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$"}

width.description: MUST be the Width of the canvas, in pixels.

height.description: MUST be the Height of the canvas, in pixels.

layers.description: MUST be an array of layers

type.description: MUST be one of {"rasterlayer"} if a png is associated, {"vectorlayer"} if a svg is associated, {"grouplayer"} if a directory is associated.

name.description: the layer's name as seen in the editor. SHOULD be matched exactly.

path.description: the layer's path. MUST be Normalized. the path MUST start from the {"layerzip.json"}.

visible.description: if omitted MUST default to {{true}}. if present MUST be a json boolean representing if its visible in the editor. must be the actual layer content even if the layer is set to be visible false.

locked.description: if omitted MUST default to {{false}}. if present MUST be a json boolean representing if its locked in the editor. if the editor doesnt support layer locking then put false.

opacity.description: if omitted MUST default to {{1}}. if present MUST be a json number representing its opacity.

layers.description: if omitted MUST default to an empty array. MUST only exist if the type is {"grouplayer"}.

blendMode.description: Blend mode following CSS / Porter-Duff naming conventions. If omitted or unknown, MUST fallback to 'normal'. Editors SHOULD support at least the first four values.
